lines.content: - evidence: No spine equivalent for an OS-isolation architecture spec/invariant ledger; spine authority (RELEASE-001 North Star acceptance, ARCHBP-047 anchor gates) governs blueprint-anchor conformance, not two-brother OS-isolation.
